TABLE 2 Parameter estimates of the minimal adequate generalized linear model quantifying the effect of frequency- dependent
hybridization among Anopheles arabiensis (species 1), Anopheles coluzzii (species 2) and Anopheles gambiae s.s. (species 3), based on the strength
of their pair sexual isolation indices IPSI. The subscripts of the coefficients refer to the hybridizing species pair i, j. Results are presented
according to the usual GLM output; that is, the intercept and slope of each species pair are expressed as the difference with respect to the first
